name: Linear Regression
description: Linear Regression models the relationship between a continuous target variable and one or more input features by fitting a linear equation.
input: This takes in a DataFrame and performs Logistic Regression
output: It generates the LinearRegressionModel and passes it to the next Predict and ModelSave Nodes. The input DataFrame is also passed along to the next nodes.

fields.name: modelIdentifier
fields.title: Model Identifier
fields.description: Identifier used when training multiple models in loop execution. Begins with $loop followed by column names separated by underscores.

fields.name: splitRatio
fields.title: Split Ratio
fields.description: Controls the proportion of data used for training versus validation.

fields.name: featuresCol
fields.title: Features Column
fields.description: Vector column containing all independent variables used to train the regression model.

fields.name: labelCol
fields.title: Label Column
fields.description: Target column containing the continuous numeric value the model is trained to predict.

fields.name: predictionCol
fields.title: Prediction Column
fields.description: Output column where predicted numeric values are stored after scoring.

fields.name: fitIntercept
fields.title: Fit Intercept
fields.description: Determines whether the regression model includes an intercept term.

fields.name: maxIter
fields.title: Maximum Iterations
fields.description: Maximum number of optimization iterations performed during model training.

fields.name: regParam
fields.title: Regularization Param
fields.description: Controls the strength of regularization to prevent overfitting.

fields.name: elasticNetParam
fields.title: ElasticNet Param
fields.description: Balances L1 and L2 regularization. A value of 0 applies pure L2, while 1 applies pure L1.

fields.name: solver
fields.title: Solver
fields.description: Optimization algorithm used to fit the linear regression model.

fields.name: standardization
fields.title: Standardization
fields.description: Whether input features are standardized before model training.

fields.name: tol
fields.title: Tolerance
fields.description: Convergence threshold that determines when the optimization process stops.

fields.name: weightCol
fields.title: Weight Column
fields.description: Optional column specifying the relative importance of each training record.

fields.name: aggregationDepth
fields.title: Aggregation Depth
fields.description: Controls the depth used for distributed aggregation during optimization.

fields.name: epsilon
fields.title: Epsilon
fields.description: Controls robustness of the Huber loss function when selected.

fields.name: loss
fields.title: Loss
fields.description: Specifies the loss function optimized during training.

fields.name: saveCoefficientsPath
fields.title: Path to Save Coefficients
fields.description: Filesystem path where model coefficients and intercept are saved as CSV.

fields.name: regParamGrid
fields.title: Regularization Param Grid Search
fields.description: Set of regularization values evaluated during hyperparameter tuning.

fields.name: elasticNetGrid
fields.title: ElasticNet Param Grid Search
fields.description: ElasticNet mixing values tested during grid search.

fields.name: maxIterGrid
fields.title: MaxIter Param Grid Search
fields.description: Different iteration limits evaluated to optimize convergence.
